initialPrompt: You are a bot able to read cards. I need you to read the attached card and provide me the type of card. You'll find it on the top and should be either Unit, Event or Upgrade. Only return the type.

properties.description: Top left of the card
Top, either Unit, Upgrade or Event
To the right of Card Type, either Space, Ground
Under type and location
Optionally, under the name
Located in the red icon in the middle of the image
Located in the blue icon in the middle of the image
Located between Power and Health, seperated by dots
Located under tags in the big area. Surround bold text with the | character.

Located below the cost, can be multiple icons. Depending on the colors, return the following values: Red = Aggression, Blue = Vigilance, Green = Command, Yellow = Cunning, Black = Villainy. Return as a list seperated by commas.

Top left of the card
Top, either Unit, Upgrade or Event
On the bottom left in the red icon
On the bottom right in the blue icon
Located between the bonus power and bonus health in the top line.
Located under the Name
Located above the name in the big area. Surround bold text with the | character.

Located below the cost, can be multiple icons. Depending on the colors, return the following values: Red = Aggression, Blue = Vigilance, Green = Command, Yellow = Cunning, Black = Villainy. Return as a list seperated by commas.
